name: Stage 2
description: Aggressive tune. ~+30% torque. Requires healthy injectors; intercooler upgrade strongly recommended; exhaust de-restriction recommended. NOT for stock turbo at sustained full load.

edits.comment: +32% main fueling at mid-high RPM x mid-high load.
+17% rail pressure for finer atomisation under bigger fueling. Capped 28000.
+10% boost target across wider RPM x load region. Capped 1900.

options.label: EGR off (recommended for Stage 2)
options.description: Software EGR delete via phase-of-injection saturation. Almost mandatory at Stage 2 power levels - the increased fueling produces more soot and EGR-on operation will rapidly clog the intake.

edits.comment: Flatten phase-of-injection map to its factory maximum.
